creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Jul 21 01:34:54 2013
New Revision: 323363
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323363

Log:
  - Update to 0.11.4
  
  PR:		ports/180671
  Submitted by:	Daniel Lin <linpct@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/node-devel/Makefile
  head/www/node-devel/distinfo
  head/www/node-devel/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/node-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/node-devel/Makefile	Sat Jul 20 21:37:46 2013	(r323362)
+++ head/www/node-devel/Makefile	Sun Jul 21 01:34:54 2013	(r323363)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	node
-PORTVERSION=	0.11.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.11.4
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://nodejs.org/dist/v${PORTVERSION}/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
@@ -27,6 +27,17 @@ CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--prefix=${PREFIX_RELDES
 PREFIX_RELDEST=	${PREFIX:S,^${DESTDIR},,}
 REINPLACE_ARGS=	-i ''
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${OSVERSION} >= 900033 && exists(/usr/bin/clang)
+CC=	clang
+CXX=	clang++
+GYP_DEFINES+=	clang=1
+.else
+USE_GCC?=	4.6+
+GYP_DEFINES+=	gcc_version=${CXX:S/g++//}
+.endif
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local|${LOCALBASE}|' \
 		${WRKSRC}/deps/v8/build/common.gypi \

Modified: head/www/node-devel/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/node-devel/distinfo	Sat Jul 20 21:37:46 2013	(r323362)
+++ head/www/node-devel/distinfo	Sun Jul 21 01:34:54 2013	(r323363)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (node-v0.11.1.tar.gz) = 1042853f6f288185e9dda60eaf57de50768aec5d32df7c7f462b713c56bd096f
-SIZE (node-v0.11.1.tar.gz) = 13405287
+SHA256 (node-v0.11.4.tar.gz) = 81f36aafa4a31fa59e0301358699d82766ea7ba178be810ce00444a7fc10db47
+SIZE (node-v0.11.4.tar.gz) = 14855090

Modified: head/www/node-devel/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/node-devel/pkg-plist	Sat Jul 20 21:37:46 2013	(r323362)
+++ head/www/node-devel/pkg-plist	Sun Jul 21 01:34:54 2013	(r323363)
@@ -1,5 +1,8 @@
 bin/node
 lib/dtrace/node.d
 lib/node_modules/.keepme
-@dirrm lib/node_modules
-@dirrm lib/dtrace
+share/systemtap/tapset/node.stp
+@dirrmtry share/systemtap/tapset
+@dirrmtry share/systemtap
+@dirrmtry lib/node_modules
+@dirrmtry lib/dtrace
